---
title: "CV"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

You can download my CV here:

[Download CV](files/Li_Yuan_CV.pdf)

## Education

**PhD in Statistical Science**  
Southern Methodist University  
Expected graduation: May 2027

**MS in Data Science**  
Vanderbilt University

## Research Interests

Bayesian statistics, nonlinear time series, forecasting, uncertainty quantification, statistical learning, and computational statistics.

## Technical Skills

- Programming: Python, R
- Statistical modeling: Bayesian modeling, time-series analysis, regression, machine learning
- Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Quarto, LaTeX, Jupyter Notebook
